evals.name: cb-full-ds2026
evals.prompt: /component-brief https://www.figma.com/design/fuWLltVXyBrbn6KfBAav12/Actian-Design-System-v1.0.0--Copy-for-AI-testing-?node-id=9253-33986
evals.expected_output: Should pause at Step 2.5 preview gate with push/push N,N/feedback options before any Figma output

evals.name: cb-card-selection
evals.prompt: /component-brief Button generate 2,4
evals.expected_output: Should parse card selection (cards 2 and 4 only), generate HTML with only those cards, then pause at preview gate

evals.name: cb-fat-marker
evals.prompt: /component-brief FM Alert
evals.expected_output: Should detect Fat Marker mode, generate 5-card HTML, pause at preview gate

evals.name: gf-research-default
evals.prompt: Create a flow for a user requesting access to a data asset
evals.expected_output: Should ask research opt-in question (yes/refs/no) before proceeding to screen list

evals.name: gf-skip-research
evals.prompt: Wireframe an approval workflow, no research, just build it
evals.expected_output: Should skip research question (user explicitly said no), go to screen list, then hit preview gate before Figma

evals.name: gf-with-reference
evals.prompt: Mock up a rule configuration flow. Here's a reference: https://www.figma.com/design/fuWLltVXyBrbn6KfBAav12/test?node-id=9253-33986
evals.expected_output: Should ask research opt-in, if user provides refs the skill should use those instead of competitor research

evals.name: gp-standard-deck
evals.prompt: Create a presentation about Q1 design system progress. We shipped 12 new components, fixed 34 audit findings, and onboarded 3 new designers.
evals.expected_output: Should generate HTML, serve preview, present review report with push/push N,N/feedback vocabulary

evals.name: cc-standard-component
evals.prompt: Create a Stepper component with 3 states (active, completed, disabled) and horizontal/vertical variants
evals.expected_output: Should show build plan summary (variants, properties, nested components) and wait for 'build' before creating in Figma

evals.name: cc-draft-tier
evals.prompt: quick rough draft of a Card component with default and hover states
evals.expected_output: Should detect Draft tier and skip the build plan confirmation, going straight to Figma creation

evals.name: gf-pre-answered-research
evals.prompt: Create a quick draft flow for user onboarding. I already researched — Collibra uses a 3-step wizard, Alation uses a checklist. Just build it with those patterns.
evals.expected_output: Should detect research pre-answered, skip research question, detect Draft tier, go to screen list with 3-5 screens (happy path only)

evals.name: gf-production-tier
evals.prompt: Create a final production flow for managing API keys — create, rotate, revoke, view usage. Include all edge cases.
evals.expected_output: Should detect Production tier, include happy paths + error + loading + edge cases. More screens than Standard.

evals.name: gf-infer-admin-context
evals.prompt: An administrator configures data quality rules for a dataset
evals.expected_output: Should infer role=Administrator, app=Admin. App_header Admin variant.

evals.name: gf-infer-explorer-context
evals.prompt: A data analyst searches for datasets and previews their contents
evals.expected_output: Should infer role=Analyst, app=Explorer. App_header Explorer variant.

evals.name: gf-infer-studio-context
evals.prompt: A developer creates a data pipeline connecting two sources with transformation steps
evals.expected_output: Should infer role=Developer, app=Studio. App_header Studio variant.

evals.name: gf-ambiguous-context
evals.prompt: Create a flow for managing users
evals.expected_output: Should pause at Step 1 — ambiguous app context. Should ask for clarification.

evals.name: gf-form-states
evals.prompt: A user creates a new connection to an external database — they fill in host, port, credentials, and test the connection
evals.expected_output: Must include: connection list/empty, create form (480px), testing/loading, success, error. Standard tier.

evals.name: gf-table-interaction
evals.prompt: Admin reviews pending access requests — they can approve, reject, or request more info on each request
evals.expected_output: Must include: table view, detail/expanded row, approve confirm, reject with reason, request info, empty state. FM Table Cell components.

evals.name: gf-multi-step-wizard
evals.prompt: Create a flow for importing a CSV file — the user uploads, maps columns, previews data, and confirms the import
evals.expected_output: Wizard pattern: upload, column mapping, preview table, confirmation, progress, success, error. Custom drag zone with fm-custom- prefix.

evals.name: gf-empty-and-first-use
evals.prompt: User visits the notifications center for the first time
evals.expected_output: Must include FM Empty State component for first-use. Also: populated view with items, notification detail/action.

evals.name: gf-component-selection-form
evals.prompt: No research. Build a flow: user fills in their profile — name, email, role (dropdown), bio (text area), notification preferences (toggles), and saves.
evals.expected_output: FM Text input (name, email), FM Dropdown (role), FM Text Area (bio), FM Toggle (prefs), FM Input Label each, FM Button Primary (save). 480px form container.

evals.name: gf-component-selection-table
evals.prompt: No research. Build a flow: admin views a list of datasets with name, owner, status (active/archived/draft), last modified. They can filter by status and search by name.
evals.expected_output: FM Table Cell Header/Text/Pill, FM Search input, FM Dropdown or Tabs for filter. Table full-width (extended element).

evals.name: gf-component-selection-feedback
evals.prompt: No research. Build a flow: user submits a form, sees a success toast, then navigates away. If validation fails, show inline errors.
evals.expected_output: FM Toast for success (not Alert). Inline errors on form fields. FM Alert only for persistent errors.

evals.name: gf-forms-480px-rule
evals.prompt: No research. Build: user creates a new tag — enters tag name, selects a color from a grid of swatches, and adds an optional description
evals.expected_output: Text input + textarea in 480px container. Color swatch grid full-width (extended element). Action footer: primary right, secondary left, inside content area.

evals.name: gf-extended-elements-fullwidth
evals.prompt: No research. Build: user selects datasets to include in a collection by checking rows in a table, then names the collection and saves
evals.expected_output: Selection table full-width (extended element). Collection name input 480px. Both correct width constraints.

evals.name: gf-custom-chart
evals.prompt: No research. Build: user views a dataset quality dashboard showing completeness score, row count trend over 7 days, and a breakdown of data types
evals.expected_output: Custom elements: fm-custom- prefix, --fm-* vars, lo-fi (labeled rectangles not polished charts), HTML comments explaining each.

evals.name: gf-custom-drag-drop
evals.prompt: No research. Build: user reorders columns in a table by dragging them
evals.expected_output: Custom fm-custom-sortable or fm-custom-drag-zone. Lo-fi dashed border + grip handles. --fm-* vars, not hardcoded colors.

evals.name: gf-button-variants-and-icons
evals.prompt: No research. Build: user views a record detail page with actions: Edit (primary), Delete (outline, destructive), Download CSV (secondary with leading download icon), and a back arrow icon button
evals.expected_output: FM Button Type=Primary Label='Edit' no icons, Type=Outline Label='Delete' no icons, Type=Secondary Label='Download CSV' leading icon visible, FM Icon Buttons for back arrow. All labels contextual.

evals.name: gf-tabs-configuration
evals.prompt: No research. Build: user views a dataset detail page with 3 tabs — Overview, Schema, Lineage. Overview is active by default. There's also a placeholder for future tabs.
evals.expected_output: FM Tab State=On for Overview, State=Off for Schema/Lineage, State=Placeholder for future tab. Text set to actual names, not Tab 1/Tab 2.

evals.name: gf-navigation-items
evals.prompt: No research. Build: admin navigates from the Rules page to create a new rule. The sidebar should show: Dashboard, Datasets, Rules (active), Settings, and 2 placeholder items.
evals.expected_output: FM Side navigation item State=On+Label='Rules' for active, State=Off+Label for others, State=Placeholder for placeholders. Active matches current page.

evals.name: gf-input-states
evals.prompt: No research. Build two screens: (1) empty form for creating a connection, (2) the same form with a validation error on the host field and a filled port field
evals.expected_output: Screen 1: inputs Type=Placeholder. Screen 2: host with error state, port Type=Default (filled with value like 5432), dropdown Type=Filled. FM Input Label with contextual labels.

evals.name: gf-page-header-variants
evals.prompt: No research. Build 3 screens: (1) a list page with just a title, (2) a detail page with title and subtitle, (3) a page with title and action buttons (Create New + Export)
evals.expected_output: FM Page Header Type='Title only' / 'Title + Subtitle' / 'Title + Actions' respectively. Must use the correct variant, not Title only + manual buttons.

evals.name: gf-table-cell-variants
evals.prompt: No research. Build: a table showing connections with columns — Name, Type, Status (Active/Error/Paused as colored pills), Last Sync, and a placeholder column
evals.expected_output: FM Table Cell Header for headers, Text for Name/Type/Date, Pill for Status, Placeholder for future column. Contextual sample data.

evals.name: gf-dropdown-states
evals.prompt: No research. Build 2 screens: (1) form with empty dropdown labeled 'Select region', (2) same form after user selected 'North America' with dropdown open showing options
evals.expected_output: Screen 1: FM Dropdown Type=Placeholder. Screen 2: Type=Open with menu items (selected=On, others=Off). Not a fake open state.

evals.name: gf-checkbox-radio-toggle-states
evals.prompt: No research. Build: settings form with checked/unchecked checkboxes, selected radio in a group, an off toggle, and a disabled-but-on toggle
evals.expected_output: FM Checkbox On/Off, FM Radio On/Off, FM Toggle Off/On with correct Style=Default or Disabled. Each with FM Input Label.

evals.name: gf-contextual-copy
evals.prompt: No research. Build: admin sets up a scheduled data refresh — picks a dataset, sets frequency (hourly/daily/weekly), chooses a time, and enables notifications
evals.expected_output: Nav items contextual (Datasets, Schedules, Settings — not Item 1). Page header specific. Button labels action-specific (Schedule Refresh — not Submit). Realistic dropdown options.

evals.name: gf-minimal-prompt
evals.prompt: Create a flow
evals.expected_output: Should pause at Step 1 — no feature described. Must ask what to build. Must NOT infer or generate anything.

evals.name: gf-two-subflows
evals.prompt: No research. Build a flow for submitting and approving a data access request — show both the requester's experience and the approver's experience
evals.expected_output: TWO sub-flows with separate flow-rows and cover cards. Requester=Explorer, Approver=Admin. Different App_header variants.

evals.name: gf-reference-image
evals.prompt: Build a settings page flow inspired by this reference
evals.expected_output: Should detect reference mentioned but not provided. Ask for the reference. Should NOT ask research opt-in since user indicated they have references.
